title: Strong Senior Fullstack Engineer
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Lead development of high-performance web applications using Next.js and React, with deep understanding of SSR (Server-Side Rendering), ISR (Incremental Static Regeneration), data fetching, and caching strategies.
  • Design and implement clean, scalable backend APIs (RESTful / GraphQL), and design database schemas optimized for both read and write performance.
  • Collaborate with AI engineers to integrate LLM-based features, real-time voice intelligence, and analytics into production environments.
  • Architect deployment and scaling strategies across Vercel, AWS, or serverless/container infrastructure.
  • Own the end-to-end development lifecycle — from design and implementation to deployment, monitoring, and optimization.
  • Evaluate trade-offs across different infrastructure and DevOps solutions to balance scalability, cost, and reliability.
  • Improve performance, authentication, and CI/CD automation, maintaining code quality and stability.
  • Work closely with product and design teams to deliver smooth, responsive user experiences.

Qualifications

Education & Experience

  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field;
  • Around 3 years of fullstack development experience, with proven experience in AI SaaS or LLM-based application development;
  • Prior project experience in the education, legal, or financial sectors will be an advantage.

Technical Skills

  • Highly proficient in Next.js and React, including SSR/ISR, caching, and data rendering strategies.
  • Skilled in Node.js (NestJS/Express), TypeScript, and database design (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, etc.).
  • Strong experience designing backend APIs and optimizing database performance.
  • Familiar with cloud deployment and scaling (AWS, Vercel, GCP, or serverless/container).
  • Knowledge of CI/CD automation, auth/permissions systems, and monitoring tools (Grafana, Datadog).
  • Bonus: experience with performance optimization, load testing, or AI/LLM integration.

Preferred Attributes

  • Excellent architectural and problem-solving skills; able to think systemically and act pragmatically.
  • Strong ownership, independence, and adaptability in fast-paced environments.
  • Passion for AI-driven product engineering and agentic systems.
  • Strong communication skills in English; proficiency in Mandarin is an advantage for communication with regional colleagues or partners.

What We Offer

  • Competitive compensation and growth-oriented equity incentives;
  • Opportunities to work alongside leading AI entrepreneurs and technical experts;
  • An open, collaborative, and innovation-driven culture;
  • Flexible work arrangements and strong support for professional growth;
  • The opportunity to help build next-generation Agentic AI platforms for industries such as education, legal, and finance.

postedCompany.description:
About Us
We are a high-tech company specializing in artificial intelligence innovation and the development of Agentic AI (autonomous intelligent agent) technologies. We are dedicated to building the next generation of intelligent applications capable of understanding, reasoning, and taking action.
Our mission is to empower enterprises with AI-driven systems that enable business automation, intelligent decision-making, and enhanced human-AI collaboration—creating AI agent products that deliver real-world impact.
postedCompany.name: AIKONIC FUTURE TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
